div.h1: Three-Level View: Tracer → Kernel → Tracee Interaction

p.em: Single syscall interception lifecycle with costs at each layer

g.text: Context switch: CR3 load (tracee page table)
Save all 168-byte register file to task_struct
Tracer woken via wait queue signal
Context switch: CR3 load (tracer page table)
DMA-less memcpy: kernel page → user page
Writes return value into rax; orig_rax preserved
ptrace_notify again — stop at syscall exit
Second context switch back to tracer
Read rax=retval; print formatted syscall line
x86_64 Register Roles at Syscall Boundary
clobbered by SYSCALL | rcx | return addr
clobbered by SYSCALL | r11 | saved RFLAGS
Total: 168 bytes — 3 cache lines (64 bytes each)
Checked at every syscall entry point
Enqueue SIGCHLD to tracer wait queue
Phase 5: Exit stop — tracer wakes again
